prompt_improvements.improvement: Explicitly require implementations to prevent empty-secret creation paths when secret deployment is optional.
prompt_improvements.example_instruction: If a secret is optional, derive deployment from non-empty secure value or enforce validation so a secret cannot be created with an empty value.

prompt_improvements.improvement: Ask the implementor to document when secure-by-default network ACLs are intentionally deferred.
prompt_improvements.example_instruction: If Key Vault public access is left enabled, include rationale and dependency on follow-up private endpoint/firewall work.

prompt_improvements.improvement: Require capture of deployment validation command output and explicit note if environment credentials are unavailable.
prompt_improvements.example_instruction: Run `az deployment group validate` and include pass/fail evidence; if blocked by authentication, record exact blocker and rerun instructions.
